title: Argon Tableware 12x Classic White 18cm Cereal Bowls - Porcelain Ice Cream Ramen Oatmeal Dishes - Microwave and Dishwasher Safe
features: Versatile & Practical: Perfect for everything from your morning cereal to hearty soups and stews, these 18cm (7") breakfast cereal bowls are the ideal size for everyday meals, offering style and practicality for every occasion.

Durable Porcelain Construction: Crafted from high-quality, vitrified white porcelain, these bowls are lab-tested for durability and strength, ensuring they withstand frequent use while keeping their sleek and attractive appearance.

Convenient & Safe: Microwave and oven safe, these bowls make reheating meals effortless. They are also dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, ensuring a hassle-free experience in both preparation and cleanup.

Classic, Minimalist Design: The clean white finish of these bowls complements any kitchen or dining room décor, providing a touch of minimalist sophistication to your table while seamlessly blending with other crockery pieces.

Long-Lasting & Practical: These 18cm cereal bowls are perfect for everyday dining, with their vitrified surface protecting against staining, odors, and color absorption, making them an ideal choice for both home and professional kitchens.
description: Product Description At Rinkit, we’re in the business of delivering everyday happiness. How does that work exactly? Well, just think of something for your home or garden that would make your life a little better or easier; a high-quality product that does its job really well, and puts a smile on your face every time you use it. Our ever-expanding catalogue features all manner of home and garden accessories and essentials, from dining tables to doorknobs; parasols to pinatas! Think it ! Find it ! Rink it ! White Crockery By Argon Tableware Crafted from porcelain, this collection of white crockery have been fully vitrified against the absorption of strong colours and flavours, making them the perfect tableware solution for all kitchens. Their white colour blends seamlessly with any style of décor and, as with all our china crockery, each bowl is microwave and dishwasher safe. With a complete matching suite of classic white crockery available, Argon Tableware is the perfect choice for creating your ultimate dining table setup.
